title: Org Chart Enhanced Features

posts.author: dmayfield (Dawn Mayfiele)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have three requests related to Org Chart:

  1. The option “export to PDF” does appear, however, it doesn’t’ work. It generates a blank PDF.
  2. Allow the chart to pull from an employee board so everyone doesn’t have to be in Monday and also allow for multiple lines under the name, such as location and/or contact info
  3. Allow the people boxes to be dragged to other locations within the line they’re on so the cart won’t keep growing sideways vs. placing someone who has people reporting to them in the middle so their reports are centered.
